title: KOSMOS Scenario 1 RunReport
description: JSON schema for the RunReport artifact emitted by the Scenario 1 (route safety) end-to-end test suite when KOSMOS_E2E_DUMP_DIR is set. Mirrors the Pydantic v2 RunReport model defined in specs/030-scenario1-route-safety-rebase/data-model.md §2.5.

schema_version.description: Frozen schema version. Bumping requires a spec amendment.

trigger_query.description: Citizen-facing Korean query. This field is permitted here but MUST NOT appear in any OTel span attribute (FR-019).

tool_call_order.description: Ordered names of tool calls dispatched. Happy path has length 6.

fetched_adapter_ids.description: Ordered list of tool_ids invoked via lookup(mode='fetch'). Happy path is exactly ['koroad_accident_hazard_search', 'kma_forecast_fetch'].

final_response.description: Korean synthesis string. Present when stop_reason='end_turn'; null otherwise.

adapter_rate_limit_hits.description: Map from adapter_id to rate-limiter call count. Happy path: {'koroad_accident_hazard_search': 1, 'kma_forecast_fetch': 1} (FR-016).

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock duration for the full run in milliseconds. Advisory; not asserted by CI.

outcome.description: Value of kosmos.tool.outcome (FR-017). Absence is an assertion failure.

adapter_id.description: Value of kosmos.tool.adapter (FR-018). Present iff the span corresponds to lookup(mode='fetch').

attribute_keys.description: Full set of attribute names on the span. Used by FR-019 to assert no Korean citizen query string is present.
